falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 Index closes above 5,500 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained breakout above this level would contradict the bottom pattern similarity and indicate a bullish trend, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff Score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would indicate speculative excess, directly contradicting the current low-pressure HOLD verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60%
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A meaningful divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the basis for the current UNKNOWN verdict.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
